settings.heading: How can I place an order?
settings.row_content: You can place an order through our website by selecting your desired products and following the checkout process.

settings.heading: Do you offer international shipping?
settings.row_content: Yes, we do offer international shipping thru reputed logistic companies but the costs vary by country.

settings.heading: How long will it take to receive my order?
settings.row_content: Depending on Styles, most orders are shipped within 5-7 days. International orders typically take 10–12 days. For urgent orders, please contact us.

settings.heading: Can I track my order?
settings.row_content: Yes, once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number to monitor its progress.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We do not offer returns unless the product has a manufacturing defect.

settings.heading: How do I initiate a return?
settings.row_content: You can initiate a return by contacting our customer service team or visiting the Returns section on our website.

settings.heading: *Can I exchange an item for a different size or color?
settings.row_content: Yes, exchanges are allowed within 5 days, subject to product availability.

settings.heading: How do I find the right size?
settings.row_content: Please refer to our size chart, available on each product page, for accurate measurements.

settings.heading: Are your clothes true to size?
settings.row_content: Yes, our clothes are designed to fit true to size, but we recommend checking the size chart for specific products.

settings.heading: Do you offer custom sizing or alterations?
settings.row_content: Yes, we offer custom sizing, but our standard sizes are designed to cater to most body types.

settings.heading: What materials do you use?
settings.row_content: We use a variety of premium fabrics, including cotton, silk, polyester, and sustainable materials. Each product page includes details about the fabric used.

settings.heading: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.row_content: We accept payments via credit/debit cards, UPI, and Razorpay.

settings.heading: Do you offer any discounts or promotions?
settings.row_content: Yes, we offer seasonal discounts and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated.

settings.heading: Can I use multiple discount codes on a single order?
settings.row_content: No, only one discount code can be applied per order.

settings.heading: What materials do you use?
settings.row_content: We use a variety of premium fabrics, including cotton, silk, polyester, and sustainable materials. Each product page includes details about the fabric used.

settings.heading: Are your clothes sustainably made?
settings.row_content: We prioritize sustainability by using eco-friendly materials and ethical production practices.

settings.heading: Where are your products made?
settings.row_content: Our products are designed and manufactured in Delhi, ensuring high-quality standards and fair labor practices.

settings.heading: How do I contact customer service?
settings.row_content: You can reach us via email at info@sitarah.in, or through the contact page on our website.
